examples: Amender's mother employs a personal trainer, a bodyguard, a singing coach and a councilor to look after all her fifteen-year-old daughter's needs.
You're a glorified bodyguard, that's it.
He has an all-female bodyguard contingent.
After he leaves, Mustafa reappears, accompanied by Taddeo as his bodyguard, dressed in Turkish clothes.
He changed his telephone number and hired a bodyguard for his wife and children.
